name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Exciting News!
body:
Peter,

I have some very exciting news and because
you have been such a great supporter of me in the past, I wanted
you to be among the first to hear it.

When it became clear to me that my time
serving as the Secretary of HUD was coming to an end, I began to
ponder what would come next. As you know, I'm not one to simply
rest on my laurels, so I began to think about how I could
continue to serve our great nation while advancing the four
principles that make this country great. Throughout my life
there have been four "cornerstones" that have guided me: Faith,
Liberty, Community, and Life. These cornerstones have been the
foundation of my policy making and I still believe that solutions
guided by these four are effective, and will point our nation
toward the common good.

That's why I'm so pleased to share with you
that I have recently launched the American Cornerstone Institute
(ACI). ACI's mission is to champion conservative solutions to
the real problems our nation faces. With faith, wisdom, and
compassion, ACI is not afraid to challenge conventional or
prevailing groupthink on key public policy questions and will
push back against the lies and distortion that are often targeted
toward conservative ideas. With independent research, grassroots
outreach, and collaboration with state and local entities,
faith-based groups, and private organizations, ACI will work to
heal the divisiveness that plagues our nation's politics.

Peter, as you know I do not like to beat
around the bush-- there is a very clear purpose for my email-- I
could use your help. In order for ACI to fulfill our mission and
make a significant impact, we need partners like you that share
our values and are willing to stand beside us and support our
shared principles of faith, liberty, community and life. Will
you join us today with your support?

Just this week, President Trump provided his
endorsement and support of our work:

"Ben Carson has committed his entire life to
bringing good to this world. As he embarks on his newest
endeavor in founding the American Cornerstone Institute, through
its four pillars of faith, liberty, community, and life, I have
no doubt he will continue his good works in our fight against the
threats to these four cornerstones of our republic."

- President Donald J Trump

Now is the time to stand firmly in support of
America's founding principles and pursue common sense solutions
that challenge conventional groupthink. But we can only do it if
we work together. Please stand with us today and together we can
put America back on track.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder, American Cornerstone Institute

name: Team Samirah
subject: People Power vs. Outside Spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Samirah for Delegate
body:
It's time to get money out of politics and start pushing for a democracy that is inclusive of all voices.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29716583/287276875/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGJlZDFjYS01YWJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yxrc0fybMSiMXmn941M0wyMqucKtr2z2Jox3tv5VRKU=) Derek, over the past few weeks there has been a huge uptick in outside spending in Ibraheem's race. The vast majority of it is coming from a so-called "nonpartisan" group that is spending tens of thousands in attacks and mud-slinging against Ibraheem. It begs the question: if this group is truly nonpartisan why are the spending so heavily in a Democratic primary against a progressive, working-class champion like Delegate Ibraheem Samirah? **For far too long our democracy has been corrupted by outside spending by groups that have little-to-no connection with our communities. Ibraheem will always fight for what's right and that's why he relies on grassroots donors like you to fund this campaign -- not the outside groups who seek to push their own agenda. ** With just two weeks until Election Day, it's a sprint to the finish. [**Will you help Ibraheem stand up to these attacks by chipping in today? Friend,
I’m sure you’ve heard it before, ‘slow and steady wins the race.’ And when it comes to voter registration, that couldn’t be more true. The WVDP is continuing our systematic intentional effort, and right now we need your help. Will you help us? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

Can you make a donation, and help cover costs for our voter registration drives? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/wv]

subject: The only way we’ll be able to pull this off in just two weeks is with grassroots support from folks like you.

Hey Peter — Election Day is only two weeks away! Hala’s been working around the clock to meet with voters and share her vision of a better, more inclusive Virginia where everyone has a seat at the table — along with her bold plan to get us there. name: Action Alert (LeftAction)
subject: Petition: Demand Marjorie Taylor Greene Resign or be Expelled
body:
This QAnon-conspiracy-spreading, insurrection-defending, secession-endorsing bucket of garbage — managed to offend on a whole new front when she compared being asked to wear masks with what happened to Jews in the Holocaust.
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/mtg-e?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_
---
|
---
| | | Hi Friend, **_(***Kick this "[bucket of garbage](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta25fbea5-4ae4-4ba9-8d8e-fc67adbe9d15/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)" out of Congress!) _**
### [Demand Marjorie Taylor Greene Resign or be Expelled](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf859bfda-3531-433a-a7b2-03f0a74fa8f9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-GA) — a QAnon-conspiracy-spreading, insurrection-defending, secession-endorsing [bucket of garbage](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta951aa94-ae41-44c1-9d58-a35d7b269aa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) — managed to offend on a whole new front when she compared being asked to wear masks with what happened to Jews in the Holocaust. And then she doubled down on it — refusing to apologize and saying she said "nothing wrong." [**Enough is enough. It's time for her to resign, or be expelled**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T401ed455-0c07-40f7-ac20-e8c3d94ea77a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). It's time for GOP House leader Kevin McCarthy to insist she step down, or to rally Republican support for the necessary supermajority to expel her. [**Add your name: Demand Marjorie Taylor Greene Resign or be Expelled**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T052aac28-2c12-4cf2-ba21-87bcc454fd2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7e8ff90c-b0ff-4944-aacb-354cff2223fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **[Add your name: Kick this bucket of garbage out of Congress](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6048aac0-e904-481d-ae71-6e0ec74b3839/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
| | |

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: Breaking: Expel MTG Petition Reaches 50,000
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marjorie
body:
"Petition Urging Marjorie Taylor Greene Be Expelled Hits 50,000
Signatures" - Newsweek
Dear Peter -- I could be expelled from
Congress.
The powerful Chairman of the Rules Committee
in the House, Jim McGovern, has now joined in on the chorus along
with AOC, Maxine Waters and Nancy Pelosi. . .
This is an important development, because
McGovern is the gatekeeper on the House floor and he decides
which bill comes up for a vote.
If he wants to bring a bill to the floor to
kick me out of Congress, he'll have the backing of Nancy Pelosi,
the Jihad Squad, and every Democrat in the House.
That's why I need your help to survive this
battle for a third time in just the last three months.
Will please help fill my "Stand with MTG" war
chest with a generous contribution of $25 so that the
Democrats will think twice before trying to kick me out?
They couldn't get me the first time.
Or the second time.
But now they're hoping the third times a
charm.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Never before has a Republican been under
attack like me since the Democrats tried to impeach and remove
President Trump from office.
Over the weekend, Democrats and the Fake News
Media cranked up their calls to KICK ME OUT of Congress.
CNN, MSNBC, PBS, ABC, NBC, CBS. . .
They went on all the channels demanding I be
removed from Congress because I dare to tell the truth about
their Socialist schemes.
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Can I please count on an emergency
contribution of $25 right away?
You see, money talks in Washington, DC.
If they think I'm weak and don't have the
dollars to battle with them, they'll run me out.
But if they know I have the financial support
of the PEOPLE, they know no matter what they do, the voters will
be with me.
I'm enemy #1 of the Democrats and the Fake
News Media.
Please STAND WITH ME by making a generous
contribution to help me FIGHT BACK and WIN today!
For freedom,
Marjorie Taylor Greene
STAND WITH MTG - CHIP IN $25

Paid for by Marjorie
Taylor Greene's People Over Politicians Committee - a joint
fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Greene for
Congress and Save America Stop Socialism PAC. Marjorie Taylor
Greene's People Over Politicians Committee PO Box 1575, Roswell,
Georgia 30077

name: House DFL Team
subject: One year later
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8vvPsfRZd1c7Kipdr9pvBUbUeiPr3ANERFASZYu-Dk=/DHMKW-snwNHmoHUMfpwKD_1ni7ksI7_Ws3XC2DLoUcs=)
| | Friend, One year ago today George Floyd was murdered by a Minneapolis police officer. The guilty verdicts delivered earlier this spring are a step toward justice, but there is a long way to go to provide true public safety and justice for all. Last year the Legislature, led by the People of Color and Indigenous Caucus, passed the Minnesota Police Accountability Act of 2020 which included a ban on chokeholds, use of force reforms, and mental health training amongst other critical reforms. This was a good first step, but more needs to be done. No matter where we were born, how we pray, or what we look like, every Minnesotan deserves to make it home at the end of the day. George Floyd, Daunte Wright, and so many others should still be alive. While we can't bring George Floyd back, we can honor his memory by continuing the fight for justice and accountability. Thank you, House DFL Team
---
| Prepared and paid for by the DFL House Caucus.
---

DFL House Caucus
255 E Plato Blvd
Saint Paul MN 55107 United States
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8vvPsfRZd1c7Kipdr9pvBUbUeiPr3ANERFASZYu-Dk=/5UZum7YlXGBRYoqKg519shHPtMEmAbgphkPR_4CAyvc=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8vvPsfRZd1c7Kipdr9pvBUbUeiPr3ANERFASZYu-Dk=/uNnLqj2sW6p4mjhV4LtcT2mB1zumf7-_vapz_dHAags=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/e8vvPsfRZd1c7Kipdr9pvBUbUeiPr3ANERFASZYu-Dk=/4pjKulXE1T4kYC48AToa31T4_FNsm3r4gKcAWHkDLKg=)

body:

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Honoring George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
_In this email, I will be discussing police brutality, anti-Black racism, and murder. Please only continue if you feel comfortable doing so. If you would like to show support for justice in policing, you can sign our petition[here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ySR4g2_vqz24Sn2UIZ6scIFpjqO1Ya4cfgDdUPCeumQ=/IMRdRg6sgbrFNUYJ_29eWQ904jc-1FveLcROvZCmT_g=?gpsid=50_115_19056&ms=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil). -- Derek_
Peter,

Today marks one year since the tragic murder of George Floyd. While Mr. Floyd's killer was held accountable and convicted for his crimes, there is still so much more we need to do to achieve true justice.

We need to continue showing up, speaking out, and demanding change. George Floyd inspired so many people to raise their voices -- some of them for the first time -- and we cannot stop until justice is real for ALL Americans.

One of the best ways we can honor George Floyd's memory is by ensuring a world where Black and brown individuals are not targeted because of the color of their skin. Too many lives have been cut short and there are far too many tragic stories.

There isn't one single policy that will erase centuries of systemic racism, but the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is a strong step forward. Mr. Floyd's family has expressed their support for this legislation, and the House has already passed this bill.

This historic legislation would:
* End the use of chokeholds;
* Combat racial profiling;
* Limit the transfer of military equipment to local police departments;
* Ensure officers who commit wrongful conduct are held accountable;
* Establish a National Police Misconduct Registry;
* And much, much more.

Peter, if you would like to take action today, you can sign our petition [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/ySR4g2_vqz24Sn2UIZ6scIFpjqO1Ya4cfgDdUPCeumQ=/IMRdRg6sgbrFNUYJ_29eWQ904jc-1FveLcROvZCmT_g=?gpsid=50_115_19056&ms=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil) to call on Senate leadership to bring the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to a vote.

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/ySR4g2_vqz24Sn2UIZ6scIFpjqO1Ya4cfgDdUPCeumQ=/PiWi82mM_zrldseDIIi1KIVhvE9PXIYb5K0hgObsh2E=).

I’m fired up and ready to make my closing argument to voters, but right now there’s one thing you can help me with before we finish this race. | | Hey, it’s Mark. Today is two weeks until the primary election in Virginia! Can you believe it? I’m fired up and ready to make my closing argument to voters, but right now there’s one thing you can help me with before we finish this race: Thursday is our last big fundraising deadline before our primary. That’s why I’m setting a goal to bring in 300 more contributions before the deadline. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Not only will your donation help show the strength of our campaign right before the primary, but it will also help us keep our TV ads on the air and fund our Get Out the Vote push! = This is it! Let’s show them how many grassroots supporters are behind this campaign. Thanks, Mark Herring Attorney General Mark Herring is fighting every day for justice, equality, and opportunity for ALL Virginians. "Serving as your Attorney General has been the honor of my life. I've proudly worked on your behalf to expand and secure the rights of our fellow Virginians, and to show Virginians a new vision for what their Attorney General can do for them. The progress we’ve made has been historic, but the work isn’t done." = | | = Mark has been the most progressive Attorney General in the history of Virginia and we need your help to keep him in office working for us.** But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. You can click to only get our most important messages, or you can . PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY ONE COMMONWEALTH PAC One Commonwealth PAC P.O. Box 1753 Richmond, VA 23218 United States

clean_body: Republicans and Democrats are STATISTICALLY TIED in Battleground states. | Peter, This is HUGE NEWS for our movement, and we can’t afford to ignore it. One of America’s TOP pollsters has just announced that Republicans and Democrats are STATISTICALLY TIED in the must-win battleground states that are so essential to winning the majority. | | | | | | In the House, we’re just FIVE VOTES short of a Republican Majority. And in the Senate, just A SINGLE VOTE would give us the Majority. That’s why it’s so important that we fully fund our outreach programs. We have to fire up the Republican Grassroots so we can WIN these battleground races! | Thank you for whatever you can do. Republican Polling Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: We cannot wait any longer for justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
_In this email, I'll be discussing police brutality, anti-Black racism, and the murder of George Floyd. Please only read if you feel comfortable doing so._ Dear Peter,

One year ago today George Floyd -- a beloved father, brother, partner, and friend -- was murdered by police.

His death galvanized one of the largest social movements in the history of our country. Over the past year, millions of Americans took to the streets to demand accountability for police violence and to root out the systemic racism that threatens the lives of Black Americans and people of color every day.

Now it's up to our leaders to answer these cries for justice and enact meaningful change and reforms. President Biden asked Congress to send a justice reform bill to his desk this week. But the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is still sitting in the Senate, partially because anti-justice obstructionists like Ron Johnson would stand in the way. This issue is urgent, and as ever, Johnson is an impediment to the justice and equality that all Wisconsinites deserve.

**[I'm calling on the Senate to pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act without delay as a first step to reckoning with the racism inherent in our justice system. If you would like to join this fight for justice in policing, please add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29734148/287335687/-1401946068?gpsid=50_130_19057&ms=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&refcode=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_GFloyd_adv_gq_act__SG_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjMxMzVkYi03ZWJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pgXLpbC8t5oKdc3QMu22225NCLZ16lhMxWq1vCH2HlA=&emci=60497d52-6ebd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=963135db-7ebd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)**

George Floyd's young daughter said, "Daddy changed the world." Let's make sure we listen to her words and keep changing it for the better.

Sarah

| _If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please[ contact us here ](mailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com). _
---

Madison, WI 53701

name: Michelle Steel
subject: I need your help to get California back on track
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
What's at stake is our very way of life and our future.
****

.

[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bdV6qUaMBYPwO1CH9HXeHmByiQEOsZv1Yy5sDdwrm9RyyC-GKlHJB2eCGWJgIJdjyNyWB5TMaIHxhI7gU_oa2mI2eTIxX9rk7QGt5fqdNw4BRbmi-x1OS_nV8SL7Z5bXVZRBAm4NtRl7MYCtP_HKt9yc9zh8Sqjgpz5f-xRmK957O7_8E7P-4cai6gkkbtycZBTQHx3_XbA4MAgSMxtKUBhRzeIpDkJylK0zK5-WbPAi8vcF2J1K0Gl1o4Dn9zzBdpWTs5DK6zNKF8rbMTvlyq1Wxo5ZjKH310Jhb5twQ_Yrb2EUQ4s3_X6A2MJ8bBapqCBvZqX_tS9KS4qIFwS4xmoKrCyQpPUpFJLf6QMhC0d7qcTBUlqc9I2_tcpqi-wP6Zdnxc73NV9eyCKG-g0vYaGhz4f161UJcrWtW8ysWXzpgs7r8BdBdTB50K4KKEpOXG_Lpviawrqi2xz6t16_Ow==&c=EyOcPz6_LbJUgLo6qEQ_hmgLHyPoUYI0z1hh5bxHGnrXonTG-sMPFQ==&ch=upr4PY6Cxtnh1Qia79vvwLzfRMR15f182dqOHKsEDqIEzZ5WpLA71Q==)
Friend, frankly I'm worried about where California is heading right now under the leadership of Gov. Gavin Newsom. Droughts and wildfires, some of the highest taxes in the nation, rising costs of living, businesses and people leaving our state for elsewhere... enough is enough.

We need to make a change fast if we're ever going to get back to where we need to be. **Gavin Newsom needs to be recalled, don 't you agree?**

Republicans like me and around the state are leading the charge to help STOP Newsom before he can inflict more harm on our great state, but we need your help too. [**If you 're able to chip in any amount you can, you will help to make sure California gets back to where it needs to be.**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001bdV6qUaMBYPwO1CH9HXeHmByiQEOsZv1Yy5sDdwrm9RyyC-GKlHJB2eCGWJgIJdjyNyWB5TMaIHxhI7gU_oa2mI2eTIxX9rk7QGt5fqdNw4BRbmi-x1OS_nV8SL7Z5bXVZRBAm4NtRl7MYCtP_HKt9yc9zh8Sqjgpz5f-xRmK957O7_8E7P-4cai6gkkbtycZBTQHx3_XbA4MAgSMxtKUBhRzeIpDkJylK0zK5-WbPAi8vcF2J1K0Gl1o4Dn9zzBdpWTs5DK6zNKF8rbMTvlyq1Wxo5ZjKH310Jhb5twQ_Yrb2EUQ4s3_X6A2MJ8bBapqCBvZqX_tS9KS4qIFwS4xmoKrCyQpPUpFJLf6QMhC0d7qcTBUlqc9I2_tcpqi-wP6Zdnxc73NV9eyCKG-g0vYaGhz4f161UJcrWtW8ysWXzpgs7r8BdBdTB50K4KKEpOXG_Lpviawrqi2xz6t16_Ow==&c=EyOcPz6_LbJUgLo6qEQ_hmgLHyPoUYI0z1hh5bxHGnrXonTG-sMPFQ==&ch=upr4PY6Cxtnh1Qia79vvwLzfRMR15f182dqOHKsEDqIEzZ5WpLA71Q==)

Droughts and wildfires, some of the highest taxes in the nation, rising costs of living, businesses and people leaving our state for elsewhere... enough is enough. We need to make a change fast if we're ever going to get back to where we need to be. Gavin Newsom needs to be recalled, don 't you agree? Republicans like me and around the state are leading the charge to help STOP Newsom before he can inflict more harm on our great state, but we need your help too. == == == | == == == There's simply too much at stake, Friend: our very way of life and the future of our state for our children and grandchildren are at risk. name: Karen Bass
subject: Honoring George Floyd
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
A year ago today, George Floyd was tortured and murdered in broad daylight. Former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin knelt on George Floyd's neck and back for 9 minutes and 29 seconds, killing him.

The video footage of this brutal act forced so many in our nation to see what Black and Latinx people have been reckoning with for generations: police brutality and a system that too often results in the senseless killing of unarmed citizens.

In the wake of George Floyd's murder and the countless protests that followed, I introduced the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to reform policing and hold police accountable. This package of reforms will create a national standard for policing; _the first of its kind_. It will ban no-knock warrants, ban chokeholds, create a registry for problem officers, and change the threshold of prosecution for officers to ensure justice. It is a necessary step to hold police accountable and confront the systemic racism that plagues our law enforcement.

My bill passed the House earlier this year, but I will not rest until the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is sent to President Joe Biden's desk for his signature. Congress has a moral obligation to fearlessly address this issue. If you would like to join our fight to pass this bill, you can sign our petition [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/bsEiuZKYN__8cRfRMnDQgtKYmF1GZbNh7ktkXpIeuhI=/ZYaJGTmZih8rZxft0wFoYEaT5q8ni0LjoCrmJ3XgZjc=?gpsid=39_132_19054&ms=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&refcode=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We recently saw the officer who murdered George Floyd found guilty on all charges by a jury. But accountability is too rare. We need officers to consistently speak up and intervene when they witness abuse. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act requires officers to intervene. It helps ensure accountability and will save lives.

Today, I am thinking about Mr. Floyd's family. And of the countless other Black lives lost to an unforgiving and unrelenting system. We will march forward and continue the work to secure a more perfect union, for the people lost and for our futures.

[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.myngp.com/el/bsEiuZKYN__8cRfRMnDQgtKYmF1GZbNh7ktkXpIeuhI=/ZYaJGTmZih8rZxft0wFoYEaT5q8ni0LjoCrmJ3XgZjc=?gpsid=39_132_19054&ms=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&refcode=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210525_gfann_adv_gq_act__KB_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---

In solidarity,

Karen

Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress

918 Pennsylvania Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: A year ago today, George Floyd was tortured and murdered in broad daylight. Former Minneapolis police officer Derek Chauvin knelt on George Floyd's neck and back for 9 minutes and 29 seconds, killing him. The video footage of this brutal act forced so many in our nation to see what Black and Latinx people have been reckoning with for generations: police brutality and a system that too often results in the senseless killing of unarmed citizens. In the wake of George Floyd's murder and the countless protests that followed, I introduced the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to reform policing and hold police accountable. This package of reforms will create a national standard for policing; the first of its kind. It will ban no-knock warrants, ban chokeholds, create a registry for problem officers, and change the threshold of prosecution for officers to ensure justice. It is a necessary step to hold police accountable and confront the systemic racism that plagues our law enforcement. My bill passed the House earlier this year, but I will not rest until the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is sent to President Joe Biden's desk for his signature. Congress has a moral obligation to fearlessly address this issue. If you would like to join our fight to pass this bill, you can sign our petition . We recently saw the officer who murdered George Floyd found guilty on all charges by a jury. But accountability is too rare. We need officers to consistently speak up and intervene when they witness abuse. The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act requires officers to intervene. It helps ensure accountability and will save lives. Today, I am thinking about Mr. Floyd's family. And of the countless other Black lives lost to an unforgiving and unrelenting system. We will march forward and continue the work to secure a more perfect union, for the people lost and for our futures. In solidarity, Karen Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress Bass for Congress 918 Pennsylvania Ave SE Washington, DC 20003 United States We rely on this email to communicate with this grassroots team, but if you no longer want to receive our emails, please =.

name: Tate Reeves
subject: NEW: The Supreme Court is re-evaluating Roe v. Wade!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tate for Governor
body:
This past week, the U.S. Supreme Court agreed to take up a case regarding our state's law which bans abortion after 15-weeks of pregnancy. [](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=57753fca94f3418cb8a0a7220f22e785&_e=U49x8-oGPUUxKz6S0GHGpw-nSgoySYxEVF2JFn92KovpBdypZ5l-cFNYzzla0pFhbDRw0vyOEMg5qkAKeuMiJ_yAi4X6p8iMBzcw1jtRheuvpMMUQzZg5fBwmJoYz6V39SToHSH5o14pL3veMRVtRx5qLCF56CfiRvrhS3Ut9Ovssj2-dFoDBCmOBeKKieJbYRUe509BrKiXx2hyxa_SSoosalQVK9232ySn7Fh37yl4ciq3KXC4xCbIWKDfJCNl2GdqpOwTL-jrxTGmHiNLbBdcl6GDG5sF5ZcmynzVobkbps4gMQIYXdNf3eHjx0wdDvEOB3RvqPn2YtnfH-4oqy5DxKRGB6lD1PPH5kPPp_Y%3D) | |
---

Dear Supporter,
This past week, the U.S. Supreme Court agreed to take up a case regarding our state’s law which bans abortion after 15-weeks of pregnancy.

This law was blocked by the 5th Circuit Court because _Roe v. Wade_ was used as an excuse, even though _Roe v. Wade_ does _**NOT**_ say abortion on-demand, for birth control, at any time, is ultimately a "right."
[**Join me - _Defend the Right to Life!_**](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=57753fca94f3418cb8a0a7220f22e785&_e=U49x8-oGPUUxKz6S0GHGp1BEMbFI-F9RbmgU1b5Y_RIMoyC85jDzI1v5BEFLUVZDmhWB1SwMI2Q-64ugufeSkfX6LR1vOtokCrh8orLAx3WNOVgc13MzZUjEBuUdp10of85ZbL3bmN5Hw_KT0C_DUIzxVpRLy4OTSQAVyfoO_yIlflhMVkHEZ8-kMsaNXneY5OzeXnr3Ev9XeOJHjCKI8JFiTmGoTMiXat9KcTI95t5KH1Cou2IpF_6BAXQb7Kbg3tIfV2-4KGtMwjlcn2502bVllRRPyKaARbIxcv17OKVjbO6Enly8_cwQaoEC8aXqCHyULMk4rAPNJRd7ZwtEt2pKkOxJcaNFdONSzGGlX2fbRjhmXX7fzfbKStXNJz8rbUGPB1Pi0_XpRXvvsDPivZ7Cs4UuFpHGhlJj2-JQOB8%3D)
The outcome of this case will have a monumental impact on the practice of abortion in this country.

Our Declaration of Independence defined “Life, Liberty and the pursuit of Happiness” as unalienable rights that have been given to all humans by their Creator. _The first of these is life._

**Abortion takes a life. Plain and simple.**

Mississippi’s law is a logical next step in reining in the abomination of _Roe v. Wade_. It outlaws abortions of convenience at 15 weeks – the moment when the baby has begun making breathing muscle movements in the womb.

This Supreme Court review of our state’s case is a potential opportunity to show the nation how wrongly and unjustly _Roe v. Wade_ was decided.

Every life is sacred, and we are all unique from day one. We have an obligation to protect our own, give a voice to the voiceless, and defend the right to life. **I am proud to take this fight to the Supreme Court.**

_**If you support the right to life, please join me by donating today.**_
[_**Stand up for Life Today!**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=57753fca94f3418cb8a0a7220f22e785&_e=U49x8-oGPUUxKz6S0GHGp1BEMbFI-F9RbmgU1b5Y_RIMoyC85jDzI1v5BEFLUVZDmhWB1SwMI2Q-64ugufeSkfX6LR1vOtokCrh8orLAx3WNOVgc13MzZUjEBuUdp10of85ZbL3bmN5Hw_KT0C_DUIzxVpRLy4OTSQAVyfoO_yIlflhMVkHEZ8-kMsaNXneY5OzeXnr3Ev9XeOJHjCKI8GK8iw3NWFLJRgZQLp1JyYVA_0bCjl63NAIkddCNHHRa4FIgleYcs_ArjqfvTmb1ae-OF7HdDGbSHp-t5i9RzmfTp20shJIfFMee6u0c6wp7CoGbmac9TkGERTI9BAFbVmggbAoOaypHa2wCp3YwBWMq_1Dwuz3mtJS3pG0GPD-ZYqCh-l0Or7fgFo5Ivw6nFKYohD1dIWRfosnBXnwOEi4%3D)

Thank you,

Governor Tate Reeves

|

subject: We really can’t afford to fall short...

body:
#

Friends — This is NOT the news we were hoping to share.
There are just **6 days** to go until our May fundraising deadline and we are only **halfway** to our 50,000 contribution goal.
Now usually, we wouldn’t be so worried about this. But One Nation, a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC, recently dropped a **_six-figure ad buy_** in Arizona attacking Mark.
So we really can’t afford to fall short. It is critical that our fundraising stays on track because if it doesn’t, Mitch McConnell and his allies will spot an opening and continue to attack our campaign.
[**So here’s the plan: Can you send a $10 donation to our people-powered campaign today? We’ll put your contribution right to work in our efforts to hold this seat and keep Mark in the Senate.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may21?refcode=em210525-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=665_6688874_gwlU3P&akid=665%2E6688874%2EgwlU3P)

body:
#

The end of May is around the corner. Here’s three things we need our supporters to know before then:
1\. Any day now universal background checks could be voted on in the Senate.
2\. We set a goal of **10,000 contributions** before the end of May so we can fight back against the NRA’s efforts to unravel years of progress on gun safety.
3\. **Your donation towards our goal is a direct sign to Congress that Americans want universal background checks passed TODAY.**

name: Nicolaus Sleister
subject: Today we remember George Floyd
body:
Today is the anniversary of the killing of George Floyd.
| | | [](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd_01&n=1)
---
| Peter, Today is the anniversary of the killing of George Floyd. We must continue to work to fight for racial justice, and we must have impactful police reform. We must end police officers' qualified immunity; we must get police officers working for the community, not against it. I have a plan that can reform our police departments, and together we can win and get actual results. Nicolaus for U.S. Senate Campaign Team
[](http://www.nick4wa.com/?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd_01&n=2)[www.Nick4WA.com](https://www.nick4wa.com?e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd_01&n=3) [](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6k0Jm8jDE109S7GZfhKfaXmMV0wRNVYoxdZ8n_Nc9D9t&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd_01&n=4)

[](https://www.nick4wa.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TszGt6HvVAjUBT4DK-5VAnA&e=4b51f502eb7221f5033bf92012057078&utm_source=nick4wa&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=george_floyd_01&n=6) **Our mailing address is:** CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER 17404 Meridian East, Suite F #256 Puyallup, Washington 98375 _Copyright © 2020 CITIZENS FOR NICOLAUS SLEISTER, All rights reserved._

name: Team LaHood
subject: Which America do you want to live in?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |

body:
Liberal activists, the media, Democrat lawmakers... we have watched them try to silence everyday conservative Americans for far too long.
[](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=b54aa77f3d524d48a269e7f2a28f49e1&_e=7A9_cD1OKuYUUBFkkFOsuUPL1v3fZWPLHeCtIu_1D7QNh0yTXWtaE-dsrrB08x8TcABvBpY9zXrb4PTE8a2A-NTkQzMWBnVRtjj7fmOuZXTM2JQWd8G4Xkc6blNtvN9rdguaUInvW5Mi3tWqibs9p242bA4JKhuHybU0Ayh2QI2-KTuUhlvpNsnJHYWsZqeEK6A8thj_flP8MoplIY8_rxkAyH4JQwCurzhyP1-8FCsNrWHB4TEPqnI8LbNUJTCpS9tCVaemyp7T-o_QHiUq2PeNe4xiK4daEa3V_lGV0drv7OX2BSBpEpBmwWC-LG3m9lhkZJRc7nDcM_8GWGa0IY2XVPJY5pt2EnZZmHvFAdKvNniQPqJ_tA-i262YxIDd9Q_WMFIRu7HJpiuOl6lCIE8_22ql9kz0oJvusPHcQ5k%3D) Dear Fellow Conservative,
I need to warn you about the most dangerous bill in Congress – H.R. 1.

Liberal activists, the media, Democrat lawmakers... we have watched them try to silence everyday conservative Americans for far too long.

**If the Left was honest, they’d call this bill what it is: the _“For the Politicians Act.”_**

Instead, they’re playing word games, and of course, the mainstream media is going along with it.

This is about nothing more than a power grab for the Left.

And I don’t know about you, but I’ve had enough.

That’s why Stand For America refuses to stand idly by while the Democrats try to push through a bill to give MORE power to Washington politicians – and LESS to the American people.

* Flooding social media with facts that highlight the principles of free and fair elections
* Engaging conservative Americans like YOU to stand against this tyrannical bill
* Stand For America will not rest until H.R. 1 is defeated – but we can’t do that without you.

Your generosity and engagement keep our push for liberty alive.
**[So, if you can contribute just $1 to help us defeat H.R. 1 right now, I hope you will.](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=b54aa77f3d524d48a269e7f2a28f49e1&_e=7A9_cD1OKuYUUBFkkFOsuUPL1v3fZWPLHeCtIu_1D7QNh0yTXWtaE-dsrrB08x8TcABvBpY9zXrb4PTE8a2A-NTkQzMWBnVRtjj7fmOuZXTM2JQWd8G4Xkc6blNtvN9rdguaUInvW5Mi3tWqibs9p242bA4JKhuHybU0Ayh2QI2-KTuUhlvpNsnJHYWsZqeEK6A8thj_flP8MoplIY8_rycS04SW-nZe-GpFWJ5EUZxtnTMp9zt9cfYgXLWJDe73ZjXY4xMMfBrTWzHFj1rmvFDgvhaEoRI3BKaybi2jOMgusB1CQRSZkA_UGDqDZt5F6sZpbB1r_AJqsjxUBr-Mgpb6F9sTGRHnrKdfy_26B52chpFktmReSjll9ViWH9VY0JDt0kZCCms8oR0fjYGGnH1Jy75SNu8_qRTC-pA3Fgo%3D)**

Glenn Youngkin is already on the air.

| Derek,

In a moment, I’m going to ask you to donate before the final primary deadline of the campaign. But before I do, I want to explain why this moment is so important.

Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate, Glenn Youngkin, is already up on TV, spending tons of his own money. Today he launched a huge ad buy, and he’s going to continue to flood the airwaves thanks to his deep pockets.

His attacks are only going to intensify after the primary ends, so we need to make sure we have the resources we need to fight back. If we don’t finish the primary strong, his lies and attacks will flood the airways unchallenged, and we’ll constantly be at a disadvantage.

We have to hit our 10,000 donor goal before midnight on Thursday and finish the primary in the strongest position possible.

[**Can I count on you to pitch in right now and help us reach our goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29739473/287354406/-2023814932?refcode=20210525_TM_5BL&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNmJjZmM0Ny05MGJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UrI1S8uUxRE24U3yNYE5wxgaJO2KECk4V0et9Z-PAYg=)

name: Alex Padilla
subject: January 6th
body:
[1]Alex Padilla for Senate

Friends —

This month, a bipartisan majority of the House passed a bill to establish
a January 6 Commission. But before the bill even came to the Senate, Mitch
McConnell made it clear that he won’t support any bipartisan efforts to
uncover the facts behind that disastrous day.

It’s a disgrace that some elected officials are fine with putting politics
over the country. And the difficult truth is that despite removing Trump
and taking steps to turn our country around, we’re still just as close to
backsliding into authoritarianism.

And let’s be clear. No one should have to plead for adequate resources to
investigate the most egregious assault on our Capitol in the history of
this country.

So I want you to hear this from me first, and I want to make it clear as
day: I’m going to do everything I can to make sure Congress establishes a
January 6 Commission to determine the facts of what happened that day, and
to make sure it never happens again.

But right now, we have a very slim 50-50 Senate majority. If we lose a
single seat in next year’s election we will lose any hope of
accountability and the January 6 Commission will be off the table. Which
is why I have to ask:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21/?refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1001&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Will you make a $3 contribution right now to help me
defend our Senate majority? If we want accountability for what happened on
January 6th we cannot afford to lose a single seat in the Senate.

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution
instantly:

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1014&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Donate $3 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1015&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Donate $25

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1016&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Donate $50 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1017&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Donate $100

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1018&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Donate $250 [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ap-em-may21?express_lane=true&refcode=em210525-1-full&t=1019&refcode2=50_159979_7KAxHb&akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb ]Other amount

The total about-face by some of my colleagues regarding what happened on
January 6th is stunning. The ability to fear for one's life because of a
violent mob, and then seek to absolve those responsible, is a powerful
testament to the toxic ethos that currently grips the Republican Party.

But I know that we will get accountability for what happened on January
6th — as long as we fight together.

Thank you for speaking up and making your voice heard.

—Alex

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.alex-padilla.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=50%2E159979%2E7KAxHb

name: moms in office
subject: Our movement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
By the time American women are 44 years old, 86% are mothers. Yet just 6% of people in the 117th Congress are mothers with school-aged children. We need more moms in office. Will you stand with us? Hi Peter, We are changing the political landscape with innovative support programs that will ensure victories now and in the years to come. **[Will you stand with us in support and help us elect](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29740593/287360964/-1644589594?refcode=0524&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNDk3NDUwLTk0YmQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8AFuzRuIIqa-m6kEPNTxtFvlKj-GX2cehZZg-Jsy3PI=)****[qualified, hard-working individuals who truly know first-hand what the majority of Americans endure from day to day--especially moms, raising the children of our future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29740594/287360965/-1644589594?refcode=0524&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNDk3NDUwLTk0YmQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=8AFuzRuIIqa-m6kEPNTxtFvlKj-GX2cehZZg-Jsy3PI=)** **A mom’s voice is an undeniable asset when creating policy that impacts our children, our families and our future. Yet, too many barriers keep women, especially moms, out of elected positions. ** Campaigning for an elected position is a full time, unpaid job. As such, many qualified women with caregiving responsibilities don’t run for office. They can't afford to give up their jobs and take care of their families, all while running a campaign. We need to lessen the risk and level the playing field. name: Erica Smith
subject: Black America needs restorative justice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
The murder of Black people in America is a national crisis and deserves to be treated as such.
#
_Content Warning: This email discusses police brutality and murder._
---
Hi, it’s Erica. I just wanted to take a minute to check in.
Today, I’m praying for George Floyd’s family, friends, and loved ones as they experience the trauma of reliving the final moments of his murder — _exactly one year ago today._
George Floyd’s murder by a police officer is a trauma known too well to Black America — a trauma rooted in hundreds of years of violence against Black bodies and a disregard for our lives. **The murder of Black people in America is a national crisis and deserves to be treated as such.**
I’m fighting with you as we protest police brutality and systemic racism in this country, and reject white supremacy in all its ugly forms. I have two sons, and they look like George Floyd when he was young. But of course, our prayers and broken hearts are not enough.
Streets have been renamed and "reforms" have been implemented, but Black people are still murdered every day at the hands of police. _It’s not an "accident," but a choice._ It’s the continuation of decades upon decades of institutional U.S. policy that violently targets Black people.
It was the choice of slavery, it was the choice of Jim Crow, it was the choice of the War on Drugs and mass incarceration. And it is a choice still being made today. Y'all, Black America needs restorative justice.
**That means Congress must pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act. That means reimagining public safety and law enforcement. And that means we need reparations.** Our survival is dependent on these changes, but it still feels insufficient.
We will keep fighting until a different choice is made. Until justice rolls like a river down every street in every town and city and washes away the blood of the murdered and the ghosts of America’s colonialist and bigoted past.
**George Floyd’s life matters. Black Lives Matter. We cannot merely speak it. We must make it so.**
Thank you for reading,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210525-114-footer&t=1&refcode2=114_3698_8-RFGf&akid=114%2E3698%2E8-RFGf)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=2&akid=114%2E3698%2E8-RFGf)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=114%2E3698%2E8-RFGf)

name: David Schweikert
subject: We're at a crossroads
body:
Friend, Thank you for being a part of Team Schweikert. I know you already know this, but we're at a crossroads in America. The Democrats are rapidly pushing their radical agenda and divisively criticizing conservatives like you and me. Enough is enough. In times like these, it’s important to have commonsense, principled conservative leadership in Washington. And, as Arizona's conservative, I will continue to fight for not only the people of Arizona, but the future of our great nation. **[And I hope you will join me today friend by becoming a member of Team Schweikert and donating to my campaign– because there’s still time for us to restore our beloved America.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=6a12c5dd9db34e749fcbc28ff88d6fe0&_e=DYGGyl_faKVMPtuW85w_r97iPcSUH9YbqoAZWstpghYFkolZcuHQu3_Pl8BaCgMUjSkG_0HSH9qVsRXhVHXPF3rhF1CW5Y9NyqxLED2VDol0EB96-C6ku3Q-SC-1IWvQs3B_zVuhtLK9LcgllhEDeLGvErIG67OzITgHGNI7yfI0eKwdAV4Rp6rjCaSLukHF7uO1cGKMFoj49xp-8o9bf_lYGO5e_TLC_lc7nYjYIv20hVUdUHQQ9vSlUirDmRVskDDG171d0kzlxQ64zOQB9rpCFx8ghyoxb8bYNetWcPoFF_vA2fFqsUsO8FFWE7782bqSSvCRCqzGaobRhs23TeMGNp2znNHa74gPx57sa9Q%3D)** I don’t know about you friend, but I’m sick and tired of the D.C. elites who continue to abuse their power, ignore our values, and disregard the Constitution. Leftists like AOC and Nancy Pelosi claim they represent all Americans and are working hard “for the people”– but they certainly aren’t working for _all of us_. As you probably know, my fellow conservatives and I helped write legislation that is keeping money in the pockets of hard-working Americans like you, and OUT of the hands of the government. And we’re committed to strengthening our borders to protect your communities. **[But we can’t do it alone – which is why I’m hoping you’ll join me with a generous gift of $35, $50, $100, $250 or more right now.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=6a12c5dd9db34e749fcbc28ff88d6fe0&_e=DYGGyl_faKVMPtuW85w_r97iPcSUH9YbqoAZWstpghYFkolZcuHQu3_Pl8BaCgMUjSkG_0HSH9qVsRXhVHXPF3rhF1CW5Y9NyqxLED2VDol0EB96-C6ku3Q-SC-1IWvQijX4Zy2GA1ZEaQ5jWlqGMy5Woh23TZpSLQXthkpJwqvGmqGvDfxJYXcKhdPWvNbSZQaww3pwClD2zJbv5V1jllVuN30Z1Xt3OosV1f9_RGjZzlS-MUpZu1L795XC-qFFlaE7i05zoZYa74AJh5FIpdBZ3rVEL3S1bhNHPmD9FXZHzu0JAf0RiN5DMRax9hHspI44UBWFLRL14fFA1Ry-DgqOiTGUYJ3hZg0WaTq9nsQ%3D)** Now I won’t pretend that any of this will be easy... Because we’ve already seen what the Democrats will do for power – canceling our values, forcing economy-crushing lockdowns, and now they are working to expand their control at the Supreme Court. Though they might have the liberal media and big tech on their side... **We know the truth, and the truth is- America is worth fighting for.** **[And we can fight for her together- which is why I hope you will consider a generous donation of $35, $50, $100, $250 or more.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=af7120946d8b4da1857594472d860a12&_m=6a12c5dd9db34e749fcbc28ff88d6fe0&_e=DYGGyl_faKVMPtuW85w_r97iPcSUH9YbqoAZWstpghYFkolZcuHQu3_Pl8BaCgMUjSkG_0HSH9qVsRXhVHXPF3rhF1CW5Y9NyqxLED2VDol0EB96-C6ku3Q-SC-1IWvQaJY4iT3-ikln4vO9T6xRd8FA5-ipfDmF1QZ2wX1aytECqL2ekSqKvHOlZ-PUMxh2WgWaL04uzU6NieLUXqqhzl2qyN69AtYEkYOoNj34wQ_nof_sicdPoQM8hxkLffX1Gd9HyZKAQn13Uwz-TsZO9NEPhUfXWau6fuRPyBa2vo2IiOkjAoaOjRSKYmnpMhTFVedU7VxqOQg6xIkwaLChVmehpZkwZ8aJKMfjxLaTxsY%3D)** I believe the American people can overcome the Left’s planned expansion of power to silence our voices and strip our values. You can bet I’m not backing down in this fight – because too much is on the line for you and me. Thank you for your support. Your trust in me, and faith in our great country inspires me to keep going to work for you. clean_body: Friend, Thank you for being a part of Team Schweikert. I know you already know this, but we're at a crossroads in America. The Democrats are rapidly pushing their radical agenda and divisively criticizing conservatives like you and me. Enough is enough. In times like these, it’s important to have commonsense, principled conservative leadership in Washington. And, as Arizona's conservative, I will continue to fight for not only the people of Arizona, but the future of our great nation. I don’t know about you friend, but I’m sick and tired of the D.C. elites who continue to abuse their power, ignore our values, and disregard the Constitution. Leftists like AOC and Nancy Pelosi claim they represent all Americans and are working hard “for the people”– but they certainly aren’t working for all of us. As you probably know, my fellow conservatives and I helped write legislation that is keeping money in the pockets of hard-working Americans like you, and OUT of the hands of the government. And we’re committed to strengthening our borders to protect your communities. Now I won’t pretend that any of this will be easy... Because we’ve already seen what the Democrats will do for power – canceling our values, forcing economy-crushing lockdowns, and now they are working to expand their control at the Supreme Court. Though they might have the liberal media and big tech on their side... We know the truth, and the truth is- America is worth fighting for. I believe the American people can overcome the Left’s planned expansion of power to silence our voices and strip our values. You can bet I’m not backing down in this fight – because too much is on the line for you and me. Thank you for your support. Your trust in me, and faith in our great country inspires me to keep going to work for you. Sincerely, David Schweikert Arizona's Conservative | | | ---|--- | 2021 All Rights Reserved | 8175 E. Evans Rd., #13176 Scottsdale, AZ 85267 click to unsubscribe

name: Team Collier
subject: permitless carry is signed into law
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
Today is a dark day in Texas, folks. **In the dead of night, the Texas Legislature sent House Bill 1927 to Governor Abbott for his signature — a dangerous bill allowing people to carry guns without a permit, training, or a background check.** At a time when gun violence is at an all-time high across the country, Dan Patrick wants to make it easier for criminals, domestic terrorists, and bad actors to harm everyday Texans and put our law enforcement officers further at risk. The truth is, if Patrick worked half as hard to address the very real safety concerns of Texans all over the state as he does attacking voting rights every chance he gets, maybe we would be making a better, safer state for all Texans to call home. The vast majority of Texans and law enforcement support common-sense gun safety reform, but Dan Patrick continues to put partisan games over the will and livelihood of the people. **This bill is reckless and will put more Texans in harm's way. Mike is committed to fighting Dan Patrick’s reckless agenda, but we need to know that Texans are with us. clean_body: | Today is a dark day in Texas, folks. In the dead of night, the Texas Legislature sent House Bill 1927 to Governor Abbott for his signature — a dangerous bill allowing people to carry guns without a permit, training, or a background check. At a time when gun violence is at an all-time high across the country, Dan Patrick wants to make it easier for criminals, domestic terrorists, and bad actors to harm everyday Texans and put our law enforcement officers further at risk. The truth is, if Patrick worked half as hard to address the very real safety concerns of Texans all over the state as he does attacking voting rights every chance he gets, maybe we would be making a better, safer state for all Texans to call home. The vast majority of Texans and law enforcement support common-sense gun safety reform, but Dan Patrick continues to put partisan games over the will and livelihood of the people. This bill is reckless and will put more Texans in harm's way. Mike is committed to fighting Dan Patrick’s reckless agenda, but we need to know that Texans are with us. Chip in any amount today to help us defeat Dan Patrick: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = These aren’t Texas values, they aren’t American values, and they certainly aren’t what people across Texas signed up for. In 2022, we will vote them all out. Thanks for your support, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

clean_body: The so-called “For the People Act” is about Democrat power, NOT democracy. %%previewtext%% 🛑 🛑 Friend, This is Senator Mike Lee from the great state of Utah. I’m glad to reach you. I’ve been raising the alarm this year and speaking up to call this out for exactly what it is... The so-called “For the People Act” is about Democrat power, NOT democracy. It’s a brazen attempt to RIG FUTURE ELECTIONS for the left. A much more accurate name for HR 1/S 1 is the “Illegal Voting Act”! Today – with the Senate Democrats desperate to ram this through, as Nancy Pelosi did months ago – we’re launching an emergency effort. Please send critical secure support to DEFEND OUR ELECTIONS: I was on Fox News recently to discuss this legislation again. Believe me, the left DID NOT like what I had to say. I will NEVER back down when our liberty and our way of life are on the line! I called the "For the People Act” what it REALLY is – an attempt to turn the Democratic Party into a sort of revolutionary institutional party with permanent control in Washington. It rivals the Alien and Sedition Acts in terms of the TYRANNY it would impose on us! This legislation MUST NOT PASS. If you agree, and rally the American people against it. We need you on board. For Liberty & America, U.S. Senator Mike Lee 🛑 🛑 | | | ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc.

body:
One of Trump's biggest accomplishments as President was SECURING our southern border -- but now the Radical Left is doing everything in their power to open our borders!

********

Border Crisis Czar Kamala Harris has gone OVER 60 DAYS since publicly addressing the border crisis - _**a border crisis the Democrats have inflicted on our nation!**_

[**FINISH THE WALL**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019bG7sW3pbdawy-BLAlT9uNkX9e4RdZUEvTea4fDW6KQB_tDT-itl4jYJVj4cSqI18MabYtq7AFCOsRhrMO_G_UuLhKDM-6-6ANE4chwlvAje_q54LIHsXwHCfpwIs7cwqMFlQIFykdrirWnjlJcWoJCP_1n3L_JBckGsSffSekno39qQpC7XTpPcRQq0jeiQVmucDCs9SQtOP_-WgvbziPQr7w3233K2xYBg4Zr9kbrjOOb1q7rszYeSXLUEpJ66bFhgVJjZnt8Utqo6jihIJgZkHQa5_QKpdXCIcGxl9DS7CgoLH5DsIlOwjeTDg2NlsGgnol6OHJMRcDpphvImt0YeCfIwWykPZ0nnKXIqOTFnOZ8ceMN6tS4XEIezE61SzkiIVry-f5W1G-oZJbkfnMRu_xkTnsnr-bNV6eBGvs7dxXvyFbUgvbXB06r0hTKZ2vHrFznX3E90cfovOkh13kO9PqVK410h&c=E1iHZ5sZr149PFY2vF7AfqDatyTPeEnuu9K5hmZX_j5-QGVPP2D5Ug==&ch=iiayhVzhIozV0xsEjYduwFgKolPua2CfrRBV81aqJHu0AIqIG3870g==)

We **CANNOT** let this happen, Fellow Conservative.

[**SECURE THE BORDER**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019bG7sW3pbdawy-BLAlT9uNkX9e4RdZUEvTea4fDW6KQB_tDT-itl4jYJVj4cSqI18MabYtq7AFCOsRhrMO_G_UuLhKDM-6-6ANE4chwlvAje_q54LIHsXwHCfpwIs7cwqMFlQIFykdrirWnjlJcWoJCP_1n3L_JBckGsSffSekno39qQpC7XTpPcRQq0jeiQVmucDCs9SQtOP_-WgvbziPQr7w3233K2xYBg4Zr9kbrjOOb1q7rszYeSXLUEpJ66bFhgVJjZnt8Utqo6jihIJgZkHQa5_QKpdXCIcGxl9DS7CgoLH5DsIlOwjeTDg2NlsGgnol6OHJMRcDpphvImt0YeCfIwWykPZ0nnKXIqOTFnOZ8ceMN6tS4XEIezE61SzkiIVry-f5W1G-oZJbkfnMRu_xkTnsnr-bNV6eBGvs7dxXvyFbUgvbXB06r0hTKZ2vHrFznX3E90cfovOkh13kO9PqVK410h&c=E1iHZ5sZr149PFY2vF7AfqDatyTPeEnuu9K5hmZX_j5-QGVPP2D5Ug==&ch=iiayhVzhIozV0xsEjYduwFgKolPua2CfrRBV81aqJHu0AIqIG3870g==)

Border Patrol says there are 40,000 criminals who illegally crossed the border AND GOT AWAY! _**Even worse, Border Patrol is outnumbered 40-1! **_

The Democrats' Radical agenda puts every single American in danger! Illegal immigrants flooding into our country will put our nation at risk, crush our economy, and threaten the security of our communities.

[**FINISH THE WALL**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019bG7sW3pbdawy-BLAlT9uNkX9e4RdZUEvTea4fDW6KQB_tDT-itl4jYJVj4cSqI18MabYtq7AFCOsRhrMO_G_UuLhKDM-6-6ANE4chwlvAje_q54LIHsXwHCfpwIs7cwqMFlQIFykdrirWnjlJcWoJCP_1n3L_JBckGsSffSekno39qQpC7XTpPcRQq0jeiQVmucDCs9SQtOP_-WgvbziPQr7w3233K2xYBg4Zr9kbrjOOb1q7rszYeSXLUEpJ66bFhgVJjZnt8Utqo6jihIJgZkHQa5_QKpdXCIcGxl9DS7CgoLH5DsIlOwjeTDg2NlsGgnol6OHJMRcDpphvImt0YeCfIwWykPZ0nnKXIqOTFnOZ8ceMN6tS4XEIezE61SzkiIVry-f5W1G-oZJbkfnMRu_xkTnsnr-bNV6eBGvs7dxXvyFbUgvbXB06r0hTKZ2vHrFznX3E90cfovOkh13kO9PqVK410h&c=E1iHZ5sZr149PFY2vF7AfqDatyTPeEnuu9K5hmZX_j5-QGVPP2D5Ug==&ch=iiayhVzhIozV0xsEjYduwFgKolPua2CfrRBV81aqJHu0AIqIG3870g==)

**DON 'T let Joe Biden and his liberal squad destroy everything President Trump and House Conservatives have worked so hard to accomplish.**

We need our top supporters who care about restoring LAW AND ORDER in our country to chip in whatever they can NOW so we can [**SECURE OUR SOUTHERN BORDER!**](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0019bG7sW3pbdawy-BLAlT9uNkX9e4RdZUEvTea4fDW6KQB_tDT-itl4jYJVj4cSqI18MabYtq7AFCOsRhrMO_G_UuLhKDM-6-6ANE4chwlvAje_q54LIHsXwHCfpwIs7cwqMFlQIFykdrirWnjlJcWoJCP_1n3L_JBckGsSffSekno39qQpC7XTpPcRQq0jeiQVmucDCs9SQtOP_-WgvbziPQr7w3233K2xYBg4Zr9kbrjOOb1q7rszYeSXLUEpJ66bFhgVJjZnt8Utqo6jihIJgZkHQa5_QKpdXCIcGxl9DS7CgoLH5DsIlOwjeTDg2NlsGgnol6OHJMRcDpphvImt0YeCfIwWykPZ0nnKXIqOTFnOZ8ceMN6tS4XEIezE61SzkiIVry-f5W1G-oZJbkfnMRu_xkTnsnr-bNV6eBGvs7dxXvyFbUgvbXB06r0hTKZ2vHrFznX3E90cfovOkh13kO9PqVK410h&c=E1iHZ5sZr149PFY2vF7AfqDatyTPeEnuu9K5hmZX_j5-QGVPP2D5Ug==&ch=iiayhVzhIozV0xsEjYduwFgKolPua2CfrRBV81aqJHu0AIqIG3870g==)

subject: RE: Response from you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rebecca PAC
body:
I was just reading the responses...
| Friend,
---
I was so happy to see so many Wisconsinites engaged, taking our Optimal Governor Survey to speak out about what kind of leader you want to replace Tony Evers.
---
But, I confess, I was a little surprised not to see a response from you.
---

clean_body: I was just reading the responses... | Friend, I was so happy to see so many Wisconsinites engaged, taking our Optimal Governor Survey to speak out about what kind of leader you want to replace Tony Evers. But, I confess, I was a little surprised not to see a response from you. You’ve been such a loyal grassroots supporter of both Governor Walker and me over the years, which is why I’d really appreciate your feedback. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Sent: Mon, May 10, 2021 Subject: Pending Submission for Friend To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, Now that the governor’s race is rated a TOSS-UP, we have ramped up our efforts and are fully committed to firing Tony Evers. But just firing Evers is not enough... We MUST replace him with a governor committed to YOUR priorities. That’s why I’ve commissioned this survey to hear directly from you about your ideal governor to replace Evers and re-open Wisconsin. OPTIMAL GOVERNOR SURVEY SUPPORTER: dpwillis67@gmail.com SURVEY: [PENDING] DEADLINE: TONIGHT at 9 P.M. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Paid for by Rebecca PAC PO Box 620215, Middleton, WI 53562

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: We must continue to fight for change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Peter,

Today marks the one-year anniversary of George Floyd's murder at the hands of a Minneapolis police officer, while others stood by. His death was yet another painful reminder of the deep-rooted inequities that still exist within our nation.

>From Minneapolis to Washington State to Washington D.C., people came together to call for justice and foundational change. These protests became one of the largest movements in American history and, we hope, an inflection point.

While George Floyd's murderer was held accountable for his actions, I know that his conviction alone will not heal the deep wounds or fix the systemic problems that are the result of over 400 years of slavery, racism, and inequality on our soil.

There is a pattern of unarmed black men being killed during encounters with law enforcement. There is also a pattern of unequal treatment in our criminal justice system, our schools, our hospitals, and our economy with far-reaching, multi-generational effects. Too often, because of this, Black Americans are denied the same opportunities for life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

The fight for racial justice and equity is far from over. We must continue working to reform systems in the United States that unfairly target Black people and people of color.

Let's continue to fight for change,

Kim

| Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress

name: Eric Holcomb
subject: Our #1 goal for this historic budget
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
This budget is far-reaching and addresses a number of key priorities. But our focus was on one main goal the whole way [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=80f465c0a543482cbb8a10400f5ef963&_e=fawB4fqorpllxcry_1ayztux7EqpF0mlHJodty9uAx8NLbypcSm5K_Msesf8Hy4AMYX5Ql5Zu3LvhgeOiq00Fe5yi6Cl9m1sYPK-MPnzk3GCP_0USGfSl18dOWBG7sChZ-SPbw7NhXQDlitiGLzYDh9iEjTC7FKsMgRqYu8eO3A5ZS2QHIo_yTKhewgl5gq-paym1B6DJKMYZTJCfS_yAfdQOJbFbQyWCk8G84pUgnkbTvG8WxwDCCo2SKkdOGCesjnVB4Y9nzfRyx0TSHdSDq-QcieYpKB4X2pOUjJzyYQYMrrhD1oGl12RHGdTsXksmx1I3XpA-JQ57lGSqEqnhAOtfdUF-ZMPtQUGt36_YNlDfGkNs04YEjafP1FYhCnYmhlzOakr3vIuxkQKsJZ71AEp_Wcqecr0MQGLRNxyutmPLt4YRx5ON67rmNEN7eXb7ljTvaBQ62GR5Ve8pemM9GJl-Otx3tYBjkjCTnxwtpE%3D) | |
---
|
---
Friend,

It’s been an incredible past couple of weeks here in Indiana.

I’m beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together during the legislative session –– and I can say with complete confidence that I’ve never been more excited, optimistic, and ready for what’s in store for Indiana’s future.

The new state budget addresses a number of key priorities:
[](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=80f465c0a543482cbb8a10400f5ef963&_e=fawB4fqorpllxcry_1ayztux7EqpF0mlHJodty9uAx8NLbypcSm5K_Msesf8Hy4AMYX5Ql5Zu3LvhgeOiq00Fe5yi6Cl9m1sYPK-MPnzk3GCP_0USGfSl18dOWBG7sChZ-SPbw7NhXQDlitiGLzYDh9iEjTC7FKsMgRqYu8eO3A5ZS2QHIo_yTKhewgl5gq-paym1B6DJKMYZTJCfS_yAfdQOJbFbQyWCk8G84pUgnkbTvG8WxwDCCo2SKkdOGCesjnVB4Y9nzfRyx0TSHdSDktvyi5FwlMaO-f2f4LUkxfbvj_5GbuEU0vqtsNRZTnBN3C4J8sesmVuyqd_mDRxKxZ5QnM6WsT_m4vDETZSreIr_vcfIaTHIKwF-9yNLd3nmYSlcRsK9SpUvfVHFfip_Wp39PdNmwpmUdYpGY5SGhb9VLUZExYvsmgHgZFZXP0CW4cUbW2kFJ-Nk42gtw3J0G4R2Cjw6d8nyxQI6Aw1A3Y%3D)
In light of 2020, we knew that steps needed to be taken to modernize law enforcement practices and strengthen Hoosier health. Both parties in both chambers worked hard to deliver these changes –– proving that Indiana isn’t just a state that works — _we’re a state that works together.__
__
_And we’re committed to providing good government service and delivering results to Hoosiers all across Indiana.

Here’s how we’re getting the job done:

**Improving Law Enforcement for Hoosiers**

✔️ Invests $70M to enhance law enforcement and modernize the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy.
✔️ Provided $30M to outfit officers across the state with body cameras.
✔️ Established de-escalation training for officers.
✔️ Investing additional resources to modernize and update several Indiana State Police posts and National Guard Armories.

**Improving the Quality of Hoosier Health**

✔️ Invested another $100M to fund mental health initiatives.
✔️ Invested $50M for the Health Issues and Challenges grant program.
✔️ Permanently extended telehealth services.
✔️ Funding all-payer claims database, giving Hoosiers realistic expectations of healthcare costs.

With many of these programs up and running, we’re already seeing a return on these investments –– and they’ll continue to pay dividends for Hoosiers for years to come.

**Friend, before you go, will you take a second to share this message with your friends and family on social media?**
[**Share on Facebook**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=80f465c0a543482cbb8a10400f5ef963&_e=fawB4fqorpllxcry_1ayztux7EqpF0mlHJodty9uAx8NLbypcSm5K_Msesf8Hy4AMYX5Ql5Zu3LvhgeOiq00Fe5yi6Cl9m1sYPK-MPnzk3GCP_0USGfSl18dOWBG7sChZ-SPbw7NhXQDlitiGLzYDh9iEjTC7FKsMgRqYu8eO3A5ZS2QHIo_yTKhewgl5gq-paym1B6DJKMYZTJCfS_yAfdQOJbFbQyWCk8G84pUgnkbTvG8WxwDCCo2SKkdOGCesjnVB4Y9nzfRyx0TSHdSDtbqMFIfY4gyjg-HNjPdAZZwIMABnWwxdaiSG6MUD6mqJOOsbMQgY0F8ln3pC2pBrgH2FNQd0KKjccwLvSWd1WKtFm3v3Nru2MAwWqh3vWxkybtZExIxeofLCRKOwiCBby1HPfcUPI8OxVSkQjyB7peESDRVmKe1mCceaS8f7_sX4m6L_QXHVQU2a5Hb2oic5UDYd7DuNv2QGliDTWOQl9E%3D)

clean_body: This budget is far-reaching and addresses a number of key priorities. But our focus was on one main goal the whole way | | | Friend, It’s been an incredible past couple of weeks here in Indiana. I’m beyond proud of what we’ve accomplished together during the legislative session –– and I can say with complete confidence that I’ve never been more excited, optimistic, and ready for what’s in store for Indiana’s future. The new state budget addresses a number of key priorities: In light of 2020, we knew that steps needed to be taken to modernize law enforcement practices and strengthen Hoosier health. Both parties in both chambers worked hard to deliver these changes –– proving that Indiana isn’t just a state that works — we’re a state that works together. And we’re committed to providing good government service and delivering results to Hoosiers all across Indiana. Here’s how we’re getting the job done: Improving Law Enforcement for Hoosiers ✔️ Invests $70M to enhance law enforcement and modernize the Indiana Law Enforcement Academy. ✔️ Provided $30M to outfit officers across the state with body cameras. ✔️ Established de-escalation training for officers. ✔️ Investing additional resources to modernize and update several Indiana State Police posts and National Guard Armories. Improving the Quality of Hoosier Health ✔️ Invested another $100M to fund mental health initiatives. ✔️ Invested $50M for the Health Issues and Challenges grant program. ✔️ Permanently extended telehealth services. ✔️ Funding all-payer claims database, giving Hoosiers realistic expectations of healthcare costs. With many of these programs up and running, we’re already seeing a return on these investments –– and they’ll continue to pay dividends for Hoosiers for years to come. Friend, before you go, will you take a second to share this message with your friends and family on social media? Thank you, Eric Holcomb | | | | | Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2021. All rights reserved. | | Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | Remaining silent on this matter isn’t an option. As each day goes by, it seems that another state is passing a new hateful bill aimed at discriminating against the transgender community. **This is plain wrong and it has to end.** These anti-trans bills fly in the face of the core values that we stand for in Nevada and across the country. The value of public service has become upended by attempts to muddy our politics, pitting us against one another -- _American against American._ _We’re not going to allow our transgender brothers and sisters to stand in this fight alone and neither should you._ [Can you stand with us against the discriminatory attacks on transgender Americans today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29744183/287373023/101077926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzU5NjY3YS1hMmJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K7PrWIzcIn5GJ6t8kjY0e33eCxnD_jJP5SHK9apJxIU=&emci=aedf7045-afbc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f759667a-a2bd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957) | | | [Sign on: Stand Against Anti-Trans Legislation →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29744184/287373024/101077926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzU5NjY3YS1hMmJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K7PrWIzcIn5GJ6t8kjY0e33eCxnD_jJP5SHK9apJxIU=&emci=aedf7045-afbc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f759667a-a2bd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)
---
It’s our job to call out hatred in any form, _no matter where it lurks._ This includes making sure that such discriminatory legislation _never_ reaches us here in Nevada.
We know that **transgender people deserve equal access to health care and education.** But, _Republicans have shown us, through their hateful bills, that they don’t agree._
Division is oftentimes a tool that bad actors use in an attempt to tear us apart. They do this to try to make us weaker and feel as though we’re powerless.
But if we stand together with the trans community, we can push back against this wave of hate _once and for all._
[Will you add your name to show support for the transgender community right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29744185/287373025/101077926?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjA5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNzU5NjY3YS1hMmJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K7PrWIzcIn5GJ6t8kjY0e33eCxnD_jJP5SHK9apJxIU=&emci=aedf7045-afbc-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=f759667a-a2bd-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=10997957)

\- Team Susie Lee

name: PragerU
subject: BREAKING: Video service refuses to host our videos!
body:
Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz6Sd5BnLcev894KtOSDb5eQZvykZVIYzniQ7TeBdVrz0cwD-5_hNHvJpjVaSLdA-L-s_Lg7d6KHDNNINZXvoI-szz_HaBFM7CUmS5t2FY5NCONB0FtYvFAZsXWyv7okaBqVku4K6BHyivNutJbK20lWOobrniCKvnXX0a8HOfIe4lHrZRHSPy32KZYIvp_wU2e_P2PyqjU194mxAjmQQ7js) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz6G4myLyDBOlvSKiSc1obM4xtrdGuB0Skntl_KEma93UrGgwgkz05kwvd3_V-cN8zjbHK5492Vyu2QkPDRjsuVmMQupR16Ze4a2Us9yx5qAySU-cXnavO1IHl7wlUqBQnKMM9oDzD766p7H2xzD-RZXygWwGkmfXWfpQKwirpSUdINLjYn5JdLQATGX5zh2PlJo630sWD4KO2esWXZSo2IH) Despite Big Tech’s relentless censorship campaign against us, PragerU’s ideas will continue to break through and shape millions of young minds. When YouTube began restricting 200+ “dangerous” PragerU videos a few years ago—including our series on The Ten Commandments—we took matters into our own hands and our viewership quadrupled! **Thanks to supporters like you, PragerU had the funding to innovate and build our own streaming infrastructure.** Instead of embedding (often restricted) videos from YouTube on our website, mobile app, and streaming TV channels, we hosted them natively using a video player software company called JW Player. Every time we’ve hit a wall, we’ve been able to find a way around it. But now, we are facing a serious new threat. Just as our contract was coming up for renewal, JW Player informed us they had updated their “community guidelines.” They announced they won’t be renewing our contract as they claim that “PragerU’s content is misleading.” PragerU pressed for more information. Which videos did they feel were misleading? What kind of methods were they using to fact-check information? Is this decision final? In their words: “...the primary basis for our decision was related to the prohibition of misleading content...based on the nature of the violations, I don’t see a viable path forward...” **[Give Today to Help PragerU Gain Independence from Big Tech!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz56VtrnJ2QDfnpPaHYZOKKvmKZUik2a4kw5HV7CRSzvZVyNady5yiD4tqOweruQBRnCFQnURcgcng9wK_e3Tx0dMFV4ULuUdTdvfjsqwFIjAI_X9z11ZBzA-ug1maQCE5Ct8-YZs4ByAB7His3WhBKPSs8Py1vkp8LfxfiE6F9qZq8d-qoUShZStNHpMVJhl3nYgWhDCDCzRl7tZn7IvrX9)** In cowardly fashion, they refused to give specifics and hid behind third party “fact-checkers” to purge PragerU as a client. Meanwhile, JW Player’s current clients include left-wing media outlets like The Young Turks and Vice! These companies produce thousands of videos using politically-charged narratives that divide our country and teach young folks to resent America. [**Now, even PragerU’s own platforms are under attack.** We call on you again, our wonderful supporters, to stand by us! ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz6S4a61DhocwAuxldIiDU55XnwBz34D6bIsNga7l8LQejivVaJAutxSvES0FcDW5NLnr7p7nhdllMicvQlefwVOTPaRpLFbiNm0gSSlisJopoErBLN-rqMmP5eDKhnkZJkF-sNFkum1vmfDvDppydC7tjPqpmBv7UiTmbcaRPq1ZozV1QnBf_njhXqE6UFBhJ_SjfP0aNLlYQK_wunlprj9) What’s at stake is Freedom of Speech and Freedom of Information. Without these freedoms, the America we love will not exist for our children and grandchildren. [Donate Now](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz721Tbm_1ZkjwSDPWNO5oMH25AlvK10RBF9fDXYiRYbkotg7mxOSkR-CIYIr4aL0otI3VJRxEymuvH9O0GNWEqmoCsqKp6sh0G6y_e6ZDyErzDeOrNN1hB2BDoO7ZTzLAKEzyDjuSx64r1MDRQan6RApMCZBQOxExuM9pe3HjSVjHKPDVsHhidnKyzB9KzQbGa6h6Ah6Ka6IyOQLFU1i3pc) **Rest assured, we’re already working on a solution to keep our videos online. Now we need your support TODAY to WAKE AMERICA UP to the dangers of online censorship while we develop alternative technologies—for greater independence from Big Tech Tyranny.** **[Please give today to keep our videos reaching and changing millions of young minds! ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz5cRE-JB_7itpe3c--4ipWu-V2Vk9Ggk62QflzFKI13Gm6fhNf6wcaiGsTNO21qcPeLQMeRM2gfDgFhijkIo0wErUVmIPA-c9AuUq-nEHLcbCqvo9qlaxp8q_fMWW2guIMh2QROWKpnONzr4GR0p6b4axLm_iUKxH7tadKdqzSpeoGJOyHrxmhdacL9yEQXVFeQFkyKy_nUyD4Un-mh3uv8)** We cannot do this alone, Your PragerU Team | |
---
**Help us fight back against Big Tech censorship. Donate today.**
[Donate Now](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=793e2884ce5741b38d9965ef89e625d7&_e=JbxXMSXBx8ekHLkLs7mtao6rQOBZXW5-seDuosndaOgdJTRJ886Mbe9R2rTeVFh7nK_CgvenpZvBdIa9lS1DLZTEXTvdV0HIZkRbHHjXnz6D6KjWXE2eKnDNuhtMcv2NisyZ1TS8POtaPzjp_GgNhYO4N80bT9oxrd7o5pr0jiMdq8waoeIv7zn0wDsgsbMJIaJtYYKjOYE7bu8FRHj8xzGUrPiWVf6RGXBZ-SaOb_MREj7QyPhtOWU2x5M0oDC5fNHfiTX6zeGoW0Miy6bUrksNT-FExS_tA86Xn9Pytv9UJN8kjaPc7Ra649inOc8E)

body:
We have a lot of work to do in our state and in our country, but we’re making huge progress under President Biden and the Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29746422/287380036/-1191835590?refcode=EM_C_210525tour_N_AL_Full_6_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkzMzJiOC1hYWJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTGdSbtQbFG22wrFCDL8jX8T_nmJ1hyUyp6fLiO4dQ4=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29746423/287380037/-1191835590?refcode=EM_C_210525tour_N_AL_Full_6_G_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NzkzMzJiOC1hYWJkLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PTGdSbtQbFG22wrFCDL8jX8T_nmJ1hyUyp6fLiO4dQ4=) Peter,

Today we kicked off our tour of Wisconsin, and I’m going to be meeting with people from across our great state including firefighters, small business owners, and other grassroots activists. [PHOTO] We have a lot of work to do in our state and in our country, but we’re making huge progress under President Biden and the Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. From passing the American Rescue Plan to proposing the much-needed American Jobs Plan, Democrats from the House to the White House have a plan to get America and Wisconsin back on track.

The American Rescue Plan sent checks directly to people that needed them, built up a national vaccination program that has given Wisconsin the resources to get almost 50% of our population their first shot, and provided funding to get our schools reopened. It’s the first step to recovering from this pandemic, and now as I travel across the state, I hear more and more people talk about the issues that we can tackle next.

When we beat Ron Johnson, we will have a clear majority in the Senate to pass crucial bills like American Jobs Plan that will fix our crumbling infrastructure, the For the People Act which will fix our democracy, and so much more.
