clean_body: We have a lot of work to do in our state and in our country, but we’re making huge progress under President Biden and the Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. | = = Peter, Today we kicked off our tour of Wisconsin, and I’m going to be meeting with people from across our great state including firefighters, small business owners, and other grassroots activists. [PHOTO] We have a lot of work to do in our state and in our country, but we’re making huge progress under President Biden and the Democratic Majority in the House and Senate. From passing the American Rescue Plan to proposing the much-needed American Jobs Plan, Democrats from the House to the White House have a plan to get America and Wisconsin back on track. The American Rescue Plan sent checks directly to people that needed them, built up a national vaccination program that has given Wisconsin the resources to get almost 50% of our population their first shot, and provided funding to get our schools reopened. It’s the first step to recovering from this pandemic, and now as I travel across the state, I hear more and more people talk about the issues that we can tackle next. When we beat Ron Johnson, we will have a clear majority in the Senate to pass crucial bills like American Jobs Plan that will fix our crumbling infrastructure, the For the People Act which will fix our democracy, and so much more. There’s a lot on the line in this election, and I promise to be a Senator that works hard for the people, not the special interest groups. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = I look forward to sharing more from the campaign trail. -Alex | ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. name: Katie Porter
subject: I know how critical this time is
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | |
You already know that I endorsed Jennifer Carroll Foy. She’s a once-in-a-lifetime candidate who knows what it's like to struggle to make ends meet, go without healthcare, and raise a family as a working mom.

**I’m reaching out today because we are exactly TWO weeks out from her primary, and this Thursday, Jennifer’s campaign is facing her FINAL pre-primary filing deadline.**

We saw during the last filing how Jennifer’s strong showing was all the buzz. She proved that she has upward momentum and the ability to mobilize a diverse coalition of Democratic voters, unlike her opponent.

**[Can I count on you to contribute to Jennifer’s campaign so that she can have another strong showing when it matters the most?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oyY38tVTzhMg-hK74K9gjNdpot34k5oLzpn808zrcwe9t6tw8EEfaeLNOtSA0_7dFP9x7meyi6JbnnSBWHN6k0THJ76B-PxVvdZJSOkNVusUmAMVoRb5r21CiagJcpatZYmEzIWmhPrFanYFi0-_jCBjFcjSqAiHxuL_BlQ4akEiJqRK4FzpDWeTP02HO97ZT0eMYH9KpjQqqPJ0jDOUufTxWMDElyxRr1qnOl1b0UleGGF43AvtZEouSw9Eb_bBOEDwEGpUGtidW-Qq52eW4VCPZNG7Ijx0uIIHY6lH14LJEkOOfkuxoygfzE1NmQN5_MBu0JrPVJaYZTtHCqHQbUzKBAaFCDjwGKcBvCSH2JLJraKfbrb8cc3hHbKVdj-NC/3c7/zSyaVwQZQs-XyovnpNwp9w/h0/-ujyEoCubsn_XdDSHfw7oRDt0JYWq2K89qfBwjvAguE)**

I’ve been excited about Jennifer’s candidacy for a while now and I can’t wait for her to be elected governor -- but that will only happen with grassroots momentum powering her campaign to victory.

Jennifer and I have so much in common. I ran for Congress because the status quo wasn’t good enough. Jennifer has put public service first in her life. She has championed the rights of marginalized people and working Virginians as a public defender and public servant in the legislature. She helped expand Medicaid and hasn't taken a dime from Dominion energy, unlike her opponent. She has a plan for Virginia’s future.

**Polling shows Jenn has momentum to defy the odds again and be elected as the first Black woman to serve as governor nationwide.[But she needs your help with only two weeks left to go. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yup46hgIDruXQ6AHBBlG3oyY38tVTzhMg-hK74K9gjNdpot34k5oLzpn808zrcwe9t6tw8EEfaeLNOtSA0_7dFm5-CeRiiLTFKM7HkINjy7QSnDxAEpUBuMw-FT1zq_eApKS8wQ0sDpFug1mzI2RiUmvxSqyb62ESa7h30lg86ucIeso_cCurax-FhH9zEdjT3f9BKAUn1Jc6L7PvT2yF_2exXArb5o5Mvhkq11oQbbib-m_m77SBkJb56bWTLHfhTZUd1r8h1Qh80UTfwxhYld9voy8sVWBTTMwiEjdRIWEC0QYvyRsmuwUUbkaWcAVDtk2sOJBq1UOMSFk5oW2BkEzsPvJyuM31Np-MwStdpin-ZsXUXdC6FQmvrieAkjzV5zElHX9WopHqrP8tEqN8U/3c7/zSyaVwQZQs-XyovnpNwp9w/h1/zaykIIrgkfFyBw9FCfK2UpKTa62quoBVyUALXuBAnOs)**

Thanks for being in this fight,

Katie Porter

* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. Donate now.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_Bh73lWki93nG0RUyySk6zkTRBWLykLOh_ikrEg1x5MEKpYqyYnAVBeW6-A4Q9ynWRLXSSckOHp1L6s2PoLg1APu1SfExFqcRirYM6axeP5cfmLe8CMBaiOPVWsGiwKXPAjRAJ-zdbTAefwZ8Cisxsu1Yzn9JBspZuLfhwEMipFZKr_e5EV9nMbLShU9xfmbOecDr2oLXtxSK5OD0lhXjdHbyZpAZoXKG7jlCDhwzYH_wSk4UdGAN8JVMQA4nKwTl05kVwcMm5Cbw82S1d7BD8JD223JsYn_QZJlYSLv6xBJauvARsOy2xTg582FO2gHE/3c7/zSyaVwQZQs-XyovnpNwp9w/h2/ywFQV2nWX9KWj1297Ue-hesAL9UvxNt1RRHUKk3dYHU)**_ [CONTRIBUTE](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y_7DmAt5nfMM7QFvx_QNiBNONmVtICnvGiz4ZKs_qG7Zfw4oaKV8pTKPdAsb3VN5_pXkWAZF1xX_YPR-e_nM-xsMzwmhzFMlK0z2hbrgzKa5jspsIbkupZZspEfWQmdOvErL7RZBXSPPWcQJ7Raq_2xy42F3WWPdOglQkL3wkl6Bw-BvhYgo2AnZHlWxP9KWGwBSx8KFp5hMH8Ll729-pD68Vbs4lvWbTBFt3FIZSw831qj0t4mLhY1pLmf5UERczX8CmaROpibyIxpUbv632z5eodTr9ugTCol4T3xKi2E0cTMTOVfeK5hMsCbbwHc5ef0GFq9y0EwRY4tzkfsnJCaeP53e0vQbZBB9_zfy1E6MQrCoVOeasavqgzVYEw8HQ/3c7/zSyaVwQZQs-XyovnpNwp9w/h3/dqPQZCyP3ycYdGlvtmPcrR1VGLiCDI3ax0E5oZkB57U) | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Honor George Floyd's life with action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
_Content warning: This email discusses police violence and murder._
Peter,
Today marks one year since George Floyd was murdered by police. My heart is with his family — and all Black and Brown families who have had a loved one taken from them by the police.
George Floyd's life mattered. Manuel Ellis's life mattered. Breonna Taylor's life mattered. Tony McDade's life mattered. The lives we lost to police violence mattered. It's important that we say their names and say that Black Lives Matter. But we must also honor them with action — _organizing to end police brutality, anti-Blackness, and racism._
**A first, transformative step is finally passing the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act and sending it to the president's desk.** The House did its part, but the painful reality is that this bill faces an uncertain future in the Senate until we end the filibuster.
[**Justice for Black and Brown communities can't wait. We must all raise our voices and demand action. Will you add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to end the filibuster and pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-justice-in-policing/?source=em20210525&t=1&akid=319%2E420207%2EC30ggz)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-justice-in-policing/?source=em20210525&t=2&akid=319%2E420207%2EC30ggz)**
The George Floyd Justice in Policing Act is the most transformative policing intervention introduced by Congress in recent memory. It would reimagine policing by ending qualified immunity, banning chokeholds, establishing a police misconduct registry, and demilitarizing the police.
But until the Senate takes action, our march toward justice will be tragically and unnecessarily stalled by political inaction. [**Add your name to our petition calling on the Senate to urgently end the filibuster and finally pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-justice-in-policing/?source=em20210525&t=3&akid=319%2E420207%2EC30ggz)
**[Add Your Name »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/end-filibuster-pass-justice-in-policing/?source=em20210525&t=4&akid=319%2E420207%2EC30ggz)**
While it is important that we clearly say "Black Lives Matter," it is not enough. We must fight for Black and Brown lives and finally secure real, meaningful, and transformative justice. Thank you for joining me in making it happen.
In solidarity,
Pramila

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

My heart is with his family — and all Black and Brown families who have had a loved one taken from them by the police. George Floyd's life mattered. Manuel Ellis's life mattered. Friend, this may be the most outrageous attack on our democracy yet.
**Extremists in the Arizona GOP – led by Kelli Ward – are currently recounting millions of ballots in a sham "election audit" – all to overturn President Joe Biden's historic victory in Arizona!**
Even worse? They've hired a QAnon-supporting, conspiracy theorist group to conduct the recount _in secret_. Let's be clear: They're not trying to make our elections more secure. **They're still trying to push Trump's Big Lie, steal the election from President Biden and rig the system so Democrats can never win in Arizona again. And we need to fight back NOW – or, as Rachel Maddow warns, it could be the END OF DEMOCRACY as we know it. **

name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: one vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate. | | |
---
Folks -- one vote makes a big difference. When Republicans tried to repeal the Affordable Care Act, they failed by one vote. When every Republican in Congress voted against the American Rescue Plan, it passed by just one vote. When Maggie Hassan won her last election by 1,017 votes, every single vote mattered. name: Roger Misso
subject: 9 minutes and 29 seconds
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

One year ago today, George Floyd was murdered. A Minneapolis police officer knelt on his neck for 9 minutes and 29 seconds until he died. Today, that police officer sits in jail awaiting his sentence for the crime.

Here at Taking the Hill, we know that our law enforcement officers have a tough job and we respect them for it. But there is absolutely no place for those in uniform - whether military, law enforcement, or otherwise - to engage in acts of racism or brutality. And there can be absolutely no condoning the disproportionate killing of Black bodies by the state.

George Floyd should still be alive. The justice delivered for his murder is not the end of our struggle to end racism in America and police overreach against our Black neighbors. Today and every day, we are constantly thinking about how we can better center Black voices in our work to establish a truly representative government that will work to end these kinds of tragedies.

For George Floyd and for his family, we will not rest until we have achieved this goal.

In solidarity,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/y9D0WgC06KXDQhMZnkb7DlrL4HQpI0MDwv2egS9s6kI=/eXPxI0d5wUBJrwPmibN08rlx20C_b6fbGCMpHyjr5OI=)

clean_body: Peter, One year ago today, George Floyd was murdered. A Minneapolis police officer knelt on his neck for 9 minutes and 29 seconds until he died. Today, that police officer sits in jail awaiting his sentence for the crime. Here at Taking the Hill, we know that our law enforcement officers have a tough job and we respect them for it. But there is absolutely no place for those in uniform - whether military, law enforcement, or otherwise - to engage in acts of racism or brutality. And there can be absolutely no condoning the disproportionate killing of Black bodies by the state. George Floyd should still be alive. The justice delivered for his murder is not the end of our struggle to end racism in America and police overreach against our Black neighbors. Today and every day, we are constantly thinking about how we can better center Black voices in our work to establish a truly representative government that will work to end these kinds of tragedies. For George Floyd and for his family, we will not rest until we have achieved this goal. In solidarity, Roger Roger Misso Executive Director = To make a contribution, = "=". **ROUNDUP: JEFF BARTOS STANDS UP FOR ISRAEL; CALLS OUT ANTI-SEMITIC RADICAL LEFT**

Please find below a roundup of various media and event appearances from Jewish Republican candidate for U.S. Senate Jeff Bartos. As the only Jewish candidate running for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania, Jeff has been the leading voice in speaking out against the alarming increase in anti-Semitism and Jewish hate crimes.

**Jeff called out the anti-Semitic, radical left for making common cause with terrorists like Hamas, Hezbollah, and Iran.**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=2494329a61be4b8983ff72fb38c09d29&_e=YTryA3NZMPOI0Gq_xuNdJcP0dne2nIHdrwv8ce_p_ro21kuXbPnqf4BTcdzJrGETGjw9jhmmEkVydJaZoQR0tZWhiVFEc_jTVRS_gxdb4WBIzyKc62TH5iEnpJRqD1JCponmNGlcUQRGAL8kYTD4siesLdVcGuirUf01s_lGpU30DOUfkyCBRsDhbj4cRacJ-073PFR00c07-YbZiLKcRDO_3V0gI3gEmJ-QeQN94i4rgEAZ6I3weFZ9E4tGk1F3Rwy0qtXm5pXuiB18HvP1j_kQtnM08kNFfhmqX1aKEpHgit2JVQ5yNYrv1oqNxd0soEyzrfL2AQRQNqyTHt1BCHViMQG3jC5vZEVtw8pA7gC28sCmZ-2XWZEa_rfdxhITmhYYcBFXrehV5ez30wYMrTfeH2dwuAWrKJV7PHRNoPTK8WYq3BeZUI5eODhi8PAYhJGFhJIgr7AK6z7Du2Mf4Zk5s2pDU3feL7spo7QohTcPgnQuVT3DOpuum_Dw9OTH9OtguKTYd4wr5FM934HanO1Yf5CS82WSwwllg4BlzBKXM040FXHj4TxGfgwHkxsk)

_"The left is anti-Semitic. It is an accepted ideology of the left to be anti-Semitic.... Congresswoman Omar stood with Hamas, cheered the terrorists, and then launched a fundraising email on the heels of supporting terrorists... Iran, Hamas, Hezbollah, they are the allies of the radical left and the radical left are the allies of our enemies. So yes, the ideology of Hamas is to destroy Israel. The ideology of the Islamic Republic of Iran is to destroy Israel. Congresswoman Omar and Rashida Tlaib and others on the far left, the fringe, are anti-Semitic, they mean to harm our allies, and they make common cause with terrorists." _

**Jeff responded to the rise in hate crimes against Jews by saying that Jew-hatred has been normalized by the radical left. **

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=2494329a61be4b8983ff72fb38c09d29&_e=YTryA3NZMPOI0Gq_xuNdJcxctS9I-mlrr40I_mJNIknNIRZAidyU8LTB7oM3O1XMt3ejtvx7iesK7NdDHnmi73jKVoPWo8-nE1pZ9DMl5aRdbsYzUuWXJEUlOMK3EVM-9OVIEPThOY2usFuTApMbO6pu7H1kxv48ZxWDLb4uLCyskSHWnCcJKGuiTvDANU3y1GxsttpHlDA1EYxDOlKYAatdJDyMqDhnHw_FmZppHO7yHCHR5FaHcIR6XAWygNIhwziXpQbkIm8-iiPpdM0emwoGOsAQb25xGm3nvvnNlmfQ4-_CyTSp4TbWHZCr8-Y3Fd34vTL0-wesptNQorP73i_o9L9QqaOFntsD4lTf8koQc72CROJJblLLf3Vj5OY0RYo7IL30Jzn_TtQhnYYyvqqzhqItXIJdpQYK_8fLgNu_ZiNOk90lJSG99MmB2O7zuDL1I1DvXj_7SBJszgYzKGTjuHGosk2kE3TpMe0AX-mIaXGwOyzLJg5nEPlc4OWJYZ7E4JTkpiNB9RmpIfxfl0rMHPrNEc6uo5lvKRBAVh2gI3u2n97FdwLWK-AZ0pMS)

_"Jew-hatred, let's call it what it is, Jew-hatred has been normalized by the radical left. It's unacceptable, it's un-American, and all good people need speak out and say, 'enough.'" _

**Jeff pledged to oppose efforts to defund the Iron Dome or anything else relating to the safety and security of Israel.**

[](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=2494329a61be4b8983ff72fb38c09d29&_e=YTryA3NZMPOI0Gq_xuNdJQDiAlowyM9SWu2__2kbv767Fd6PY_BIubSSFEcfNpgFYxtNlNH66sCo6GeLw5Qr0OKGD45Ua5wu7yjfdUyz64_BvMI4bqWaZsUFXPs6ezjdX1tuANDiQ0p8yqpsxdMFV-C0j7KnYojLQU2F0gOCkOGuKcohAzL_tnL0YwVJLzODJNxse_7a6kifcKYMazjrckIMtct-NCUg1MfbfoSkGiYgu5oD9eclHabytrpHsuNNE3vm8mHauKFVmTGpLK09bd0gWF9DOqcNh4Gzg1JkMK9AxDUhgleFdyuO8wuqM97aeqt_y1saQO4otTWYIwWVkeCD9dHlIQvMXpScNMFLblgYNFEzIs-x4oV-8JBt8g9qAFq-zRhRQ2nVhD-3OZ-9eYF7vkLQ82pwBK56DdThp6nNGqjTsqgkP3XBoDhwTC8fLSVSvVBHQX4VrD2z7fuKTauYo3Dr-j7tgtQ97yzOoW1e51gtUPYw_DRr97jswchmLK91mAD4ajcJswSfop-DaQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: Peter, if we don't reach our goal we will be giving the Dems a leg up , this is urgent. Peter, this is urgent. In just 6 days , we will hit our end-of-month fundraising deadline. And we need to take immediate action to ensure that the radical left does not flip Iowa blue. We know that last year they spent nearly a quarter of a BILLION dollars on the US Senate election trying to push their socialist agenda here in Iowa. And now, they are getting ready to do that again with our race. Peter, we need your help to ensure Gov. Reynolds reaches her end-of-month goal. If you chip in before the deadline, we will be able to keep the radical left out of Iowa. name: Patrick Morrisey
subject: Biden's 'China & Russia-First / America-Last' Policies
body:
| | | | Biden is charging forward on his radical warpath promoting 'China First / America Last' policies.
---
---
Dear Peter,
Biden is charging forward promoting 'China & Russia First / America Last' policies.
Months after halting construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline, Biden waived sanctions on the Russian Nord Stream 2 Pipeline -- a natural gas pipeline connecting Russian gas supply to the European Union. Russia is already responsible for 45% of the EU's gas supply and will now become the dominant supplier of natural gas to Europe.
Back home, our energy industry is fighting back against Biden's 'decarbonization' efforts which will cripple our jobs and drive energy prices through the roof.
Meanwhile, as Biden puts in jeopardy America's energy independence, China plans to keep building new coal-fired power plants at the same rate ours would decline. Further, Biden's anti-mining initiatives would allow China to gain even more dominance in the critical rare-earth metals market.
Rare-earth metals play a central role in the development of new technology, automobiles, and computer chips.
Biden's domestic and foreign policies undermine President Trump's great achievements of obtaining energy independence, lower gas prices, and a thriving economy. It's not good.
---

---
If Biden's policies stand, only China, Russia, and other countries will benefit; sadly, America will be last, left holding the bag. We will see repeat after repeat of the recent Colonial Pipeline fiasco which created long-lines at the gas pump and soaring gas prices.
As your Attorney General, and a leader of the Defend America Movement, I won't stand for such far-left, woke, job-killing actions that put China and Russia before West Virginia, your jobs, and America's national security.
Will you stand with me today and put America first?
Chip in $25 today to help fund Team Morrisey as we continue pushing back against the Biden Administration's 'China & Russia-First / America Last' policies, and his efforts to curtail our 1st Amendment and 2nd Amendment rights.

clean_body: | | | | Biden is charging forward on his radical warpath promoting 'China First / America Last' policies. Dear Peter, Biden is charging forward promoting 'China & Russia First / America Last' policies. Months after halting construction of the Keystone XL Pipeline, Biden waived sanctions on the Russian Nord Stream 2 Pipeline -- a natural gas pipeline connecting Russian gas supply to the European Union. Russia is already responsible for 45% of the EU's gas supply and will now become the dominant supplier of natural gas to Europe. Back home, our energy industry is fighting back against Biden's 'decarbonization' efforts which will cripple our jobs and drive energy prices through the roof. Meanwhile, as Biden puts in jeopardy America's energy independence, China plans to keep building new coal-fired power plants at the same rate ours would decline. Further, Biden's anti-mining initiatives would allow China to gain even more dominance in the critical rare-earth metals market. Rare-earth metals play a central role in the development of new technology, automobiles, and computer chips. Biden's domestic and foreign policies undermine President Trump's great achievements of obtaining energy independence, lower gas prices, and a thriving economy. It's not good. If Biden's policies stand, only China, Russia, and other countries will benefit; sadly, America will be last, left holding the bag. We will see repeat after repeat of the recent Colonial Pipeline fiasco which created long-lines at the gas pump and soaring gas prices. As your Attorney General, and a leader of the Defend America Movement, I won't stand for such far-left, woke, job-killing actions that put China and Russia before West Virginia, your jobs, and America's national security. Will you stand with me today and put America first? Chip in $25 today to help fund Team Morrisey as we continue pushing back against the Biden Administration's 'China & Russia-First / America Last' policies, and his efforts to curtail our 1st Amendment and 2nd Amendment rights. | Sincerely, Patrick Morrisey West Virginia Attorney General P.S. -- Please take a look at several of our recent Fox News, NewsMax, and OANN appearances this week: | Follow our , , and Channels! Friend,

**We recently saw millions of Americans struggling to find gas and lining up for hours at the pump and, in New York, we’re paying more than we have in years. You can thank the Democrats and their liberal allies for rolling back the progress we made under President Trump. **

By canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline without a second thought, Joe Biden helped create an energy crisis that he doesn’t plan to fix anytime soon.

**President Trump’s policies made us energy independent and lowered prices for American families. We’ve already seen what’s happened under the Biden plan, so why would we keep going down this road?**

clean_body: Who's to Blame But Joe? | Friend, We recently saw millions of Americans struggling to find gas and lining up for hours at the pump and, in New York, we’re paying more than we have in years. You can thank the Democrats and their liberal allies for rolling back the progress we made under President Trump. By canceling the Keystone XL Pipeline without a second thought, Joe Biden helped create an energy crisis that he doesn’t plan to fix anytime soon. President Trump’s policies made us energy independent and lowered prices for American families. We’ve already seen what’s happened under the Biden plan, so why would we keep going down this road? We can’t afford to go back to the policies that make us more dependent on hostile foreign nations for our energy supply. | - Joe Biden tries to save the world with his “Green New Deal” policies and this is what we are left with. Millions without gas, and a million more struggling to afford a tank of gas. God Bless, Rep. Nicole Malliotakis Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O.
